hero.title: I turn business needs into real AI systems, in production.
hero.subtitle: And I make data speak: from raw data to decision. Automation, integrations and predictive analytics.

about.heading: A hybrid profile, rare by design
about.lead: Business, technology and data in one head.
about.body: I have been building AI systems in production since late 2024, and delivering websites and web solutions since 2019. My footing is twofold: Quebec and French-speaking Africa. So is my specialty: I cover both generative AI and predictive analytics, from raw data to decision. Few profiles hold both ends.

ai.label: AI & Automation projects
ai.heading: Systems that run, not prototypes
ai.intro: Every project starts from a real business problem and ends in production.

data.label: Data & Analytics
data.heading: From raw data to decision
data.intro: I don't only do generative AI. I also do serious analytics.

ecommerce.label: E-commerce & Retail
ecommerce.heading: The retail edge, on top of the tech
ecommerce.intro: Marketplaces and stores in production, with real volume.

client.label: Client sites & showcases
client.heading: More than 30 sites delivered
client.intro: A selection of client projects, from spa to agency.

services.label: Services

services.intro: From automation to analytics, including e-commerce.

cv.summary: Specialist in applied AI, automation and advanced analytics. I have been building AI systems in production since late 2024 and delivering websites and web solutions since 2019. A rare double expertise: generative AI and predictive analytics, from raw data to decision.
